continue.systemMessage:
This project uses Wheelwright for persistent AI context. READ THESE FILES FIRST:

1. .WAI/WAI-Guide.md - Token efficiency protocols, workflow modes, session commands
2. .WAI/WAI-State.json - Project foundation, decisions, constraints
3. .WAI/WAI-State.md - Strategic vision

KEY PROTOCOLS:
- ADAPTIVE workflow: Complex tasks (multi-file OR >5 steps) require Discussion → READY TO PLAN → PLAN ACCEPTED gates
- Simple tasks proceed with YOLO autonomy
- Checkpointing every 3-5 steps for large plans
- Context hygiene: Never repeat large content, use file:line references
- Commands: Time, Compact, Closeout, Shipit

Full instructions in .WAI/WAI-Guide.md

github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: Read .WAI/WAI-Guide.md for token efficiency protocols before starting work
